person.name: David de Lindsay
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
SIR DAVID DE LINDSAY, who acted as one of the Regents of Scotland in 1255, was High Chamberlain in 1256. He witnessed a confirmation charter of King Alexander in. to Balmerino as 'David de Lindesay, juniore.' He joined the Crusade of St. Louis in 1268, and died in Egypt. 

By his wife, Margaret de Lindesay, probably daughter of Walter de Lindsay, Lord of Lamberton he had issue: 
1.) SIR ALEXANDER.

2.) Sir William, Lord of Symington, who (circa 1310) founded masses at Deer for his two wives Alicia, and Margaret Oomyn, Countess of Buchan, and at Newbattle for his father and mother. Sir James de Lindesay, Lord of Crawford, succeeded to Symington, and claimed to be Lord of Buchan.

3.) Sir Duncan, brother of Sir William, named c. 1310

David died in Egypt while on Crusade for St Louis IX, King of France. Succeeded to lands in 1244, granted to father by Margaret Countess of Pembroke, in Northumberland.

parent.name: David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville

children.name: Sir Alexander de Lindsay of Crawford

zh.Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾莫丁頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當David de Lindsay於大約1244年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville42歲，母親Margaret Crawford38歲。他於大約1265年與Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年在埃及享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David de Lindsay于大约1244年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville42岁，母亲Margaret Crawford38岁。他于大约1265年与Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年在埃及享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David de Lindsay was born about 1244, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Crawford, was 38. He married Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton about 1265, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1268, in Egypt, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David de Lindsay est né environ 1244, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Crawford, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton environ 1265, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1268, à Égypte, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David de Lindsay um 1244 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville 42 und seine Mutter Margaret Crawford 38. Er hat um 1265 in Scotland Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1268 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Ägypten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David de Lindsay è nato il circa 1244 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Crawford, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton circa 1265, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1268, nel Egitto, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David de Lindsayが約1244年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父David de Lindsay Lord of Brenevilleは42歳，母Margaret Crawfordは38歳であった。約1265年にスコットランドでLady Margaret Lindsay of Lambertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年にエジプトで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David de Lindsay(이)가 대략 1244년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Crawford(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1265년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 이집트에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David de Lindsay nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Crawford, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton aproximadamente 1265, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1268, em Egipto, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David de Lindsay родился около 1244 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Crawford, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton около 1265 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1268 г. в местности Египет в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David de Lindsay nació aproximadamente 1244, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, David de Lindsay Lord of Breneville, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Crawford, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton aproximadamente 1265, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1268, en Egipto, a la edad de 25 años.
